figures.caption: Fig. 3. Deployment comparison: KD INT8 achieves highest precision (0.75) and lowest FAR (0.25) among all deployable configurations.
Fig. 2. Quantization impact: FP32 (solid) vs INT8 (hatched). Teacher collapses (−23% mAP, −24% precision), students retain performance. KD gains +4% precision under INT8.
Fig. 1. BDD100K class distribution showing severe imbalance. VRU classes (red) are significantly underrepresented compared to dominant classes such as cars.
